text.title: Tailwind CSS — Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed when tailwind is mis-applied, each with symptom, root cause, and concrete fix.

antipattern.description: <div className='bg-[#3b82f6] p-[12px]'> for a known token.
antipattern.reason: Root cause: Drift: same blue with five hex values across components. Fix: Use the token utility (bg-primary, p-3).

antipattern.description: @apply text-lg font-bold text-primary in a component CSS file for one button.
antipattern.reason: Root cause: Loses utility-first benefit; couples styles to a CSS file. Fix: Compose utilities in JSX or extract to a Button component.
Root cause: Conflicting utilities both ship; specificity decides; bugs. Fix: Use cn() = clsx + twMerge.
Root cause: Tailwind JIT cannot detect the class; gets purged out. Fix: Use a lookup map {sm:'text-sm', lg:'text-lg'}[size] or full class literals.
